evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                          |

| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz])                                      |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[abcdefopqxyz], validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

error: string_agg does not support type 'Null'

ast: string_agg(s_null)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                               |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a, , c, d], validity: [0b____1101] }) |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[acd], validity: [0b_______1] }               |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):

| Column     | Data                                                                                |

+------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: string_agg(s, '|')
evaluation (internal):
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                             |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[abc, def, opq, xyz])                                         |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[abc|def|opq|xyz], validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: string_agg(a, '|')
evaluation (internal):
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                     |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                              |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[4|3|2|1], validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------+

error: string_agg does not support type 'Null'

evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                               |

| Output | NullableColumn { column: StringColumn[a-c-d], validity: [0b_______1] }             |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
